_comment: PLACEHOLDER — Linear MCP integration for Finn Loop. OFF by default. To enable: (1) remove the leading underscores from the keys below, (2) fill in your workspace + API key, (3) run `claude mcp add-json linear "$(cat .claude/integrations/linear-mcp.json)"`. Nothing in loopkit reads this file until you wire it up manually — this is on purpose. Finn Loop's contract is 'human-gated'; auto-provisioning an issue-tracker MCP behind the human's back would violate it.

_finn_loop_hooks._on_spec_pending: create Linear issue with SPEC-PENDING.md body, label 'finn-loop:pending'
_finn_loop_hooks._on_review_rocket: move Linear issue to 'Ready for Merge', add rocket emoji reaction
